name: Santiago Castro Zuluaga
profileDescription: I am a Systems and Mechanical Engineering student focused on aerospace engineering, with a strong interest in rocket science. I enjoy working on applied engineering projects that combine programming, user interface development, CAD design, and simulation. My interests also include avionics related systems, such as sensor integration, control, and computational analysis, along with web and mobile applications.
summary-item-2: University Student in Pontificia Universidad Javeriana
summary-item-3: President and Founder of 'Xavierian Aerospace Engineering (XAE)'
summary-item-4: Ex-member and Ex-leader of Logistics in JAVEX Robotics
summary-item-5: Interested in aerospace, rocket science, avionics, CFD, and UI development
summary-item-6: Currently learning CFD Simulation and Rocket Science
summary-item-7: In my free time, I train at the gym
socialText: For anything you need, you can contact me at:
